report_records.instructor_note: Came in to an introductory class, although we're reminded by dad, showed overall enthusiasm.

Pr. Adiel arrived late to class. Please assist in ensuring earlier preparation before class time. A consistent routine may help improve punctuality. Gentle reminders or alarms could also be helpful. Kindly reinforce the importance of arriving on time for class engagement.

Had a 20mins chit-chat with her this week on Thursday; 26th. As at this evening, she hadn't read her Bible since Sunday. She said it was because of the ongoing terminal exams - gR TTN

Had a 30mins physical meet this week on Sunday; 29th, where her Bible Challenge note was painstakingly inspected page after page. It was discovered that for the past 8 weeks, no chapter summary had been done. She claimed that she felt it will consume so much of her time so she decided to not make any attempt at it at all. The agreement is that she is expected to take a picture of her daily summary & share with me as a confirmation of study for that day. Today is Day 2 for this week & I am still yet to receive any. Although, I also decided to send reminders from time to time - gR TTN

She tends to get easily distracted during class; however, she is lively and expressive, which adds warmth and positive energy to the class environment.
